## [TheCreativeGod's widget extension (import)](https://github.com/TheCreativeGod/Discord-Widgets-Extension)
```json
{"_type":"discord-widget","version":2,"display_name":"My Widget","surfaces":{"widget_bottom":{"layout":"widget_bottom_stats","components":{"stat_5":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Library Size"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"librarySize","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"stat_1":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Current Obsession"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"currentObsession","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"stat_3":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"All-Time Favorite"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"allTimeFavourite","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"stat_2":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Heavy Rotation"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"heavyRotation","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"stat_4":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Soundtrack of My Life"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"soundtrackOfMyLife","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"stat_6":{"fields":{"value":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Yesterday's Vibe"},"label":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"yesterdaysVibe","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}}}},"add_widget_preview":{"layout":"add_widget_preview_hero","components":{"hero_image":{"fields":{"image":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"image","value":"change this to an image"}}}}},"widget_top":{"layout":"widget_top_contained","components":{"contained_image":{"fields":{"image":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"image","value":"ImgUrl","fallback":{"value_type":"application_asset","presentation_type":"image","value":"ImgUrl_Fallback"}}}},"title":{"fields":{"text":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"text","value":"userName","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}}}},"subtitle_1":{"fields":{"text":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"number","value":"followerCount","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}},"label":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Followers"}}},"subtitle_2":{"fields":{"text":{"value_type":"data","presentation_type":"number","value":"publicPlaylistCount","fallback":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"UNKNOWN"}},"label":{"value_type":"custom_string","presentation_type":"text","value":"Public Playlists"}}}}}},"assets":{"ImgUrl_Fallback":{"asset_type":"image","content_type":"image/png","image":"data:image/png;base64,"}}}
```

## JSON
```js
{
    username: profile.userName,
    data: {
        dynamic: [
            { "type": 3, "name": "ImgUrl", "value": { "url": profile.ImgUrl } },
            { "type": 1, "name": "userName", "value": profile.userName },
            { "type": 2, "name": "followerCount", "value": profile.followerCount },
            { "type": 2, "name": "publicPlaylistCount", "value": profile.publicPlaylistCount },
            { "type": 1, "name": "currentObsession", "value": profile.currentObsession },
            { "type": 1, "name": "heavyRotation", "value": profile.heavyRotation },
            { "type": 1, "name": "allTimeFavourite", "value": profile.allTimeFavourite },
            { "type": 1, "name": "soundtrackOfMyLife", "value": profile.soundtrackOfMyLife },
            { "type": 1, "name": "yesterdaysVibe", "value": profile.yesterdaysVibe },
            { "type": 1, "name": "librarySize", "value": profile.librarySize },
        ]
    }
}
```

Instructions
1. Create the widget and add user data to the widget objects.
2. fill out your info in the .env, for more info check prerequisites
3. Start the bat file and enjoy.

## Prerequisites

Before running this project, ensure you have:

1. A Spotify Premium Account.
2. A registered application in the [Spotify Developer Dashboard](https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard).
3. `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID`, `DISCORD_TOKEN`, `APP_ID`, `DISCORD_USER_ID` added to your `.env` file.
